ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (e.g., 6-2) */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player (e.g., 190 lbs) */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_team_id" INTEGER /* Team ID of the team that drafted the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "agent" TEXT /* Agent of the player */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Injury status of the player */,
  "contract_details" TEXT /* Details of the player's current contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_draft_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("draft_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Head coach of the team */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary and secondary colors of the team */,
  "team_history" TEXT /* Brief history of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "referees" TEXT /* Names and IDs of the referees */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (e.g., city, stadium name) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the season */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the season */,
  "playoff_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the season includes playoffs */,
  "championship" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team won the championship in that season */,
  "regular_season_standings" TEXT /* Regular season standings of the team */,
  "playoff_round" TEXT /* Playoff round the team reached in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "role_level" INTEGER /* Hierarchy level of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role the user has */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active or inactive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the statistic entry */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistic was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
